text.title: Founder Dependency Audit Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator script enforces required keys and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Missing required fields; violates schema constraints for `founder-dependency-audit`. Validator rejects with explicit violation list.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: any revenue line without monthly_revenue or fragility score
remediation_plan with no owner or no due_cycle
status 'approved' without a distinct human reviewer
